name: AMLBot
description: AMLBot offers automated crypto transaction monitoring and wallet risk checks suited for P2P traders, OTC desks and small exchanges, exposing API endpoints for on-demand address screening.

seo.title: AMLBot — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: AMLBot: AMLBot offers automated crypto transaction monitoring and wallet risk checks suited for P2P traders, OTC desks and small exchanges, exposing API endpoin

when_to_use: Crypto wallet risk scoring for P2P trading platforms
On-demand address screening for OTC desk compliance
VASP AML checks for exchange listing due diligence
Transaction origin tracing for DeFi protocol compliance
Sanctions exposure check before cross-chain bridge transfers

pros: Purpose-built for crypto wallet and address screening
Fits P2P traders and OTC desks on pay-per-check
API endpoints for on-demand risk scoring
Lower cost than Chainalysis for small teams
cons: Coverage narrower than TRM or Chainalysis
Less suited for large-exchange KYT volumes
Attribution data on exotic chains can lag
Reporting features thin for regulated VASPs
review.verdict: Affordable crypto AML screening for small desks, not a replacement for enterprise blockchain intel.
review.best_for: P2P traders, OTC desks and small exchanges needing cheap wallet risk checks via API
review.not_for: Tier-1 exchanges or banks needing forensic-grade attribution and investigation tooling

lock_in.reason: On-chain data is public; switching providers feasible

developer_experience.reason: REST API for crypto AML; docs reasonable
